MELItem.Title: Lower Cargo Compartment Fire Extinguishing Filter/Regulator

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided cargo compartments remain empty or contain only non flammable/combustible ballast, empty cargo handling equipment (ballast may be loaded in ULDs), or fly away kits (excluding items such as cans of hydraulic fluid, cleaning solvents, batteries, capacitors, chemical generators, etc).

OperationProcedure.Para: The lower cargo compartments must remain empty or contain only non flammable/combustible ballast, empty cargo handling equipment (ballast may be loaded in ULDs), or fly away kits (excluding items such as cans of hydraulic fluid, cleaning solvents, batteries, capacitors, chemical generators, etc), pallets, and cargo restraint components. This is to be confirmed by communication with the receipt/dispatch person and by checking the load sheet prior to dispatch.
